No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to poverty eradication, social protection, or economic resources for the poor.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, nutrition, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (4.3), enhances language and critical thinking skills for employment (4.4), and fosters cultural knowledge and appreciation (4.7).

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to gender-specific issues, discrimination, or empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to water, sanitation, hygiene, or water quality.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.
